description: Guides for Unreal Engine modular characters, Skeletal Meshes, Control Rig manipulation, and MetaHuman customization.

metahuman_structure.animation_sync: MetaHuman body parts (Torso, Legs, Feet) must be synced to the main Body SkeletalMeshComponent. In C++ or Python, call set_leader_pose_component on each follower component, passing the Body component as the leader.

apis.name: unreal.SkeletalMeshComponent.set_skeletal_mesh_asset
apis.description: Updates the skeletal mesh asset used by this component.

apis.name: unreal.SkeletalMeshComponent.set_leader_pose_component
apis.description: Set the leader pose component. Essential for keeping modular MetaHuman parts (Torso, Legs, Feet) synchronized with the main Body animation.

apis.name: unreal.GroomComponent.set_groom_asset
apis.description: Sets the groom asset (hair, eyebrows, beard, etc.) for a GroomComponent.

apis.name: unreal.ControlRigComponent.set_control_value_vector
apis.description: Sets a vector control value on a Control Rig component.

apis.name: unreal.ControlRigComponent.get_control_value
apis.description: Gets the current value of a Control Rig control pin by name.

local_engine_scripts.metahuman_animator: Engine/Plugins/MetaHuman/MetaHumanAnimator/Content/Python/ - Contains performance capture and audio-driven face automation scripts.
local_engine_scripts.metahuman_character: Engine/Plugins/MetaHuman/MetaHumanCharacter/Content/Python/examples/ - Contains scripts for batch editing MetaHuman cosmetic properties (skin, makeup, eyes).
